title: Entity Observer
description: This project adds two new blocks. The Entity observer and the Player observer. The Entity observer gives a redstone signal if a entity is in front of it. The Player observer is the same, but for players.
body:
## Entity Observer

**The Entity Observer mod** is a mod that adds two blocks. The **Entity Observer** and the **Player Observer.**

### Functionality

The functionality of these two blocks is **very simple**. If the target _identity_ stands in front of the observer block, the observer block will output a **signal**, and the strength is dependant of how far away the _identity_ is. For example, if a entity is standing **6 blocks** away, the Entity Observer block will _output_ a **signal strength of 9.** That is because the **further** you are from the sensor, the **weaker** the _output will be._

### Naming

The _naming_ of the observers is also **very simple**. The **Entity Observer** will detect _entities_ and _players_ and the **Player Observer** will **_only_** detect _players_.

### Usecases

This makes the blocks _useful_ for
- traps 
- doors
- farms
- alarms
- hidden entrances
- minigames
- other redstone contraptions.

### Recepie
